tasks.name: Book a weekend beginner watercolor class under $60 within 10 miles next month
tasks.description: Find a beginner-level watercolor class held on a weekend next month, within 10 miles of ZIP 10001, costing no more than $60 with a rating of at least 4 stars, and complete a booking for 1 participant using an on-site payment option.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage and click the "Classes" option in the main menu.
On the Classes page, click the search bar, type "watercolor", and submit the search.
Use the Level filter and select "Beginner", then apply the filter.
Open the Date filter, choose the "Next month" range, and enable the option to show only weekend classes (Saturday and Sunday).
In the Location section, enter the ZIP code "10001" and set the distance filter to "Within 10 miles".
Set the Price filter maximum value to "$60" and set the Rating filter to "4 stars & up".
Use the sort dropdown to select "Soonest date" and then click on the first class result in the list.
On the class detail page, click the "Book Now" button, choose the first available weekend date next month shown in the calendar, and set the number of participants to "1".
On the booking summary page, select "Pay at Studio" (or equivalent on-site payment option) as the payment method and click the "Confirm Booking" button.

tasks.name: Enroll in an intermediate 4-week online oil painting course under $200 with evening sessions
tasks.description: Locate a 4-week intermediate online oil painting course with sessions between 6–9pm, a total price under $200, and a rating of at least 4.5 stars, then enroll 1 participant and add a materials kit add-on before confirming enrollment with an on-site payment option.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Online Classes" option in the main navigation.
On the Online Classes page, click the search bar, type "oil painting course", and submit the search.
Use the Level filter to select "Intermediate" and use the Class Type filter to select "Multi-week course (4+ sessions)".
Set the Time of Day filter to "Evening (6pm–9pm)" so that only evening courses are shown.
Set the Price filter maximum to "$200" and set the Rating filter to "4.5 stars & up".
Use the sort dropdown to choose "Best Match" and click on the first course in the results that indicates it runs for 4 weeks.
On the course detail page, click the "Book Course" button, leave the participant count as "1", and pick the next available start date from the calendar.
In the add-ons section, check the box for the "Oil painting materials kit" and proceed by clicking the button to go to checkout.
On the checkout page, leave any promo code field empty, select an on-site payment option such as "Pay in Studio" or "Pay at First Session", and click the "Confirm Enrollment" button.

tasks.name: Create a wishlist of 3 kids’ classes (ages 8–12) under $40 on different weekdays
tasks.description: Find kids’ art classes for ages 8–12 that cost less than $40 and meet on weekdays. Add exactly three different classes to the wishlist, ensuring each class is held on a different weekday (e.g., one on Monday, one on Wednesday, one on Friday).
steps: From the homepage, click the "Kids & Teens" category in the main navigation.
Use the age filter to set the minimum age to "8" and the maximum age to "12".
Set the Price filter maximum to "$40" and set the Day filter to "Weekdays (Mon–Fri)".
Scroll to the list of classes and click on the first class card to open its detail page.

If this class’s main meeting day is a weekday you have not yet selected for your wishlist, click the "Add to Wishlist" button; otherwise, use the back function or navigation link to return to the class list without adding it.
Return to the class list and open additional class cards one by one, each time adding the class to your wishlist only if its main meeting day is a different weekday from any already added.
Continue this process until you have added exactly three classes with three different weekdays to your wishlist, then click the "Wishlist" icon in the header to open the wishlist page.

tasks.name: Compare two Friday evening pottery workshops next month and book the cheaper one for 2 people
tasks.description: Find pottery workshops held on Friday evenings next month, compare the first two results, and book the one with the lower total price for 2 participants on a Friday evening date next month using an on-site payment method.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Workshops" item in the main navigation.
In the search bar on the Workshops page, type "pottery" and submit the search.
Use the Date filter to select "Next month" and set the Day filter to "Friday".
Set the Time of Day filter to "Evening (after 5pm)" so only evening workshops are shown.
In the results list, click the "Add to Compare" option on the first two pottery workshops that appear.
Click the "Compare (2)" button or link to open the comparison view for these two workshops.
In the comparison view, determine which workshop has the lower total price and click that workshop’s title to open its detail page.
On the selected workshop detail page, click the "Book Workshop" button, set the number of participants to "2", and choose the first available Friday evening date next month in the date picker.
Click the "Continue to Checkout" button, select an on-site payment method such as "Pay at Studio", and then click the final "Confirm Booking" button.

tasks.name: Buy a 3-class in-person drawing pass under $100 for morning sessions with a promo code
tasks.description: Purchase an in-person drawing pass that includes exactly 3 classes, is valid for morning sessions before 12pm, and costs no more than $100. At checkout, apply the promo code "SAVE15" and complete the purchase with a single pass.
steps: From the site header, click the "Passes & Packages" link.
On the Passes & Packages page, use the Category filter to select "Drawing" and use the Location filter to choose "In-person".
Set the Time of Day filter to "Morning (before 12pm)" so that only morning options are shown.
Use the Price filter to set the maximum price to "$100".
In the filtered results, click on the first package that clearly states it includes exactly 3 classes.
On the package detail page, click the "Buy Package" button and choose a start date within the next 30 days from the calendar.
On the checkout page, type "SAVE15" into the promo code field and click the button to apply the code.
Ensure the quantity remains at "1" pass and select the "Pay in Full Now" option or equivalent on-site payment choice.
Click the "Complete Purchase" button to finish buying the 3-class drawing pass.

tasks.name: Log in and reschedule an upcoming class to a date at least 2 weeks later
tasks.description: Access an existing upcoming booking scheduled within the next 7 days and reschedule it to a new date that is at least 14 days later than the original date, keeping the same time slot if available.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Log In" link in the site header.
In the login form, enter "testuser" in the username field and "password123" in the password field, then submit the form to log in.
After logging in, open the account menu and click the "My Bookings" option.
In the list of upcoming bookings, click on the first class that is scheduled within the next 7 days.
On the booking detail page, click the "Reschedule" button.
In the reschedule calendar that appears, choose a new class date that is at least 14 days after the original booking date, keeping the same time slot if that option is available.
Click the button to confirm the new date and time, such as "Update Booking" or "Save Changes".
Use the account menu or breadcrumb navigation to go back to the "My Bookings" page.

tasks.name: Purchase a $75 printable gift card for art classes
tasks.description: Buy a single gift card worth exactly $75, choose the printable voucher delivery method (not email or physical mail), enter a recipient name and short message, and complete the purchase using an on-site payment option.
steps: From the homepage, click the "Gift Cards" link in the main navigation or footer.
On the Gift Cards page, select the "Custom Amount" option.
In the amount field, type "75" as the gift card value.
Choose "Printable voucher" as the delivery method instead of any email or postal delivery option.
In the recipient name field, type "Alex Lee" and in the personal message field, type "Happy Birthday, enjoy some art classes!".
Click the "Add to Cart" button to add the $75 printable gift card to your shopping cart.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart, then click the "Checkout" button.
On the checkout page, enter your full name in the "Buyer Name" field, select an on-site payment option such as "Pay at Studio" or "Pay Later", and click the "Place Order" button.

tasks.name: Sign up for a free beginner adult trial class on a weekday evening
tasks.description: Find a free ($0) beginner-level adult trial or intro class that takes place on a weekday evening after 5pm, and complete the enrollment form for one person without providing any payment details.
steps: On the homepage, click the "Classes" menu and then apply the "Adult" filter.
Use the Level filter to select "Beginner".
Set the Day filter to "Weekdays (Mon–Fri)" and the Time of Day filter to "Evening (after 5pm)".
In the Price filter, set the maximum price to "$0" or select a "Free" checkbox if it is available.
Scroll through the filtered results and click on the first class labeled as a "Trial" or "Intro" session with a price of $0.
On the class detail page, click the "Enroll for Free" button.
On the enrollment form, type "Jamie Taylor" in the full name field and "jamie@example.com" in the email field.
Leave any payment section unchanged so that no payment method is selected, then click the "Confirm Enrollment" button.
